name: Scale
description: Sets the scale of registered objects with optional uniform scaling
author: stemstudio
documentation:
## Scale

Sets the scale of registered objects with optional uniform scaling

### Runtime Notes
- Attach this lambda to objects via Lambda Components.
- If Auto Apply is enabled, it runs every frame.
- If Auto Apply is disabled, call `lambdaInstance.apply(deltaTime)` from behavior/lambda code.

### Component Parameters
| Key | Label | Type | Default | Options |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `x` | X | `number` | `1` | - |
| `y` | Y | `number` | `1` | - |
| `z` | Z | `number` | `1` | - |
| `uniform` | Uniform | `boolean` | `false` | - |
